1.premise: Explaining you can't give money because you're a comedian implies deflecting charity, but reveals the homeless man giving you money out of pity.
Political neutrality could be reframed as a commodity with a known price: $900 in stimulus money.
"Killing the little guy" can mean crushing small businesses or terminating a fetus.

lines.text: What's up, guys?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Man, it's cool you're all here.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: 11 years I've never been pulled before.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So that's, you know, 11 years of comedy, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's, yeah, sure, I don't have enough time, shut up.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's hard making money doing this, man, 11 years.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I just got back, I was doing shows in the Denver area
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I'll stop by like a homeless guy
lines.label: setup

lines.text: outside the comedy club.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He goes, "Excuse me, sir, can you spare some change?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I told him, I was like, "Look, dude,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't have any money, I'm a stand-up comedian."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then I shit you not, guys, this homeless guy
lines.label: setup

lines.text: like paused and assessed my fucking situation.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Right, the dude looks up and down, down to Michigan beat,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: he just goes, "My bad fam, you right?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That fucked me up, guys.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: That ruined my whole week.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My bad fam-- I know I spoke like that too.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: He was Asian.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It was the weirdest.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: My bad fam, you're right.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And then he gave me $5, all right?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I took that shit because it's hard out here for a player.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All right, yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was on unemployment during COVID.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That was the best money I ever made, all right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm not really political.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: When Trump was showing out $900, I was like, I can be bought.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That is a lot.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I was on unemployment.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I wasn't taking advantage of the system.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We hear about that a lot, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Taking advantage of--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I wasn't the money given back to me. I was putting into small business. I love small business man
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I love it to a fault like I love small business so much
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I will only take a girl I'm seeing out to a mom-and-pop abortion clinic
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because big abortions just killing the little guy right everybody
lines.label: punchline
